data.name: 墮落精靈·芙蕾雅
data.detailed_description:
·故事簡介·

故事發生在一塊名為「艾瑪」的大陸。大陸中居住著「人族」「獸人族」「精靈族」三大種族。為了支配大陸的資源和領土,三大種族進行著無休無止的戰爭。似乎和平從來沒有在這片土地上降臨。

在三大種族中，獸人族和精靈族的矛盾最為尖銳，因此展開了數十年的戰爭。由於長期受到精靈族侵略，獸人族的部落聯合在一起組成了獸人聯盟，由德拉克斯酋長率領獸人聯盟對精靈族進行了大規模的反擊。獸人部落勢如破竹迅速佔領了精靈族與獸人族的邊境城市「法蘭迪爾」。而這座城市最著名的便是他們的領導者-芙蕾雅。

在遊戲中，我們將扮演獸人監獄長-奧托。在獸人部落攻佔法蘭迪爾城後，酋長德拉克斯派給我們一個重要的任務：「調教精靈女王-芙蕾雅」。因前線戰俘激烈，德克斯不得不率領部隊繼續深入精靈族的防線，而被俘虜的精靈女王芙蕾雅則被交到了我們手裡。

·遊戲玩法·

1. 時間管理+數值培養

（數據變動影響劇情，可玩性增強！遊玩不再單調！）

遊戲核心玩法是時間管理+數值養成。我們要在特定的時間內完成對芙蕾雅女神的調教任務，在遊戲中，玩家可以透過互動模式調教芙蕾雅來獲得【性慾】【墮落】【金錢】等屬性的增加。其中影響遊戲劇情進展的關鍵是各項數據，劇情的推進和最終的結局都會根據各項數據的變動而產生重大影響！



2. 互動模式（調教模式）

（燃燒經費！數百個局部動畫！隨劇情推進或購買道具解鎖新動畫！增強互動可玩性，玩法不再重複單一！）

本作的另一核心玩法-互動模式，我們將擁有14套互動模式的體位，每套互動體位都帶有數個動態變化！我們可以用手撫摸芙蕾雅的巨乳，也可以用舌頭舔舐芙蕾雅誘人的小穴，當然也可以掏出肉棒狠狠插入芙蕾雅，讓芙蕾雅徹底成為您的胯下玩物！隨著劇情的推進，我們將會解鎖更多體位，也可以進入商店購買道具對芙蕾雅進行虐待和調教！調教模式中所有的互動操作都擁有獨立的動畫！預計總共的動畫數量達到200+，其中還有加入腔內透視，滿足透視癖愛好者！所有對芙蕾雅的調教都會影響數據的改變！







3. 隱藏劇情+多結局

（解鎖隱藏劇情，解鎖隱藏新女主角，結局隱藏NTR劇情！）

在遊戲中內設了隱藏結局等待玩家解鎖，其中隱藏結局將根據玩家對芙蕾雅的調教進度來解鎖。玩家的操作將會影響結局走向，達成特定GOODEND結局開啟永久調教模式！每個結局和隱藏劇情都內建精美的靜態CG！ （畫師作者為足控，CG對足部刻畫細緻，足控福音！）





（更多精彩CG請在遊戲內自行探索！）

4. 妊娠系統

遊戲中加入了獨立的生理系統，遊戲中將會監控女主角生理狀態！在排卵期有射精行為將會大幅提升女主角懷孕幾率！懷孕時將模擬懷孕週期，並且變化女主角立繪狀態，提升玩家沉浸感！





更多精彩內容請在遊戲中探索！

·人物介紹·


法蘭迪爾女王·芙蕾雅（CV：伊東サラ）

高貴而充滿責任感的領袖。她的身材高挑,身高165公分,體重43公斤,擁有G杯的宏偉胸圍。
身為法蘭迪爾地區的第六位精靈女王,芙蕾雅一直以來都是眾精靈的領導者。她擅長變化系魔法,能夠用神奇的力量改變形態,為她的精靈族人帶來希望與奇蹟。

然而,儘管她承擔瞭如此重大的領導責任,芙蕾雅卻從未親歷過戰爭,因此缺乏戰鬥的經驗。她總是在追求和平與繁榮,而不是戰鬥與征服。
隨著獸人大軍佔領法蘭迪爾城，身為領導者的芙蕾雅並沒有逃跑，而是選擇和族人站在一起抵抗獸人到最後一刻。她最後被獸人聯合酋長-德拉克斯俘虜，並被關押在獸人地堡。
等待芙蕾雅的命運將會是？

法蘭迪爾城騎士長·塞伊拉（CV：七ヶ瀬 輪）

法蘭迪爾的軍隊騎士長。擁有豐富的戰鬥技能和魔法天賦但戰略意識淡薄，被德拉克斯設伏擒獲。

芙蕾雅的貼身侍衛·澪（CV：唯香）

芙蕾雅的貼身侍衛。從小便接受高強度的戰鬥訓練，對男女之事一竅不通

四處旅行的女獸人商人·蘇珊（CV：杉原茉莉）

四處旅行的女獸人商人，似乎與奧托有段不為人知的過去

甘索爾

德克斯手下最得力的干將，戰鬥經驗豐富，親手擊敗塞伊拉騎士長並俘虜了芙蕾雅。是奧託的好友，經常替酋長德拉克斯傳達指令。

監獄長·奧托

玩家扮演的角色，是負責看管犯人的獸人監獄長，善於調教女性戰俘。

data.short_description: 《墮落精靈·芙蕾雅》這是一款互動調教類遊戲，在遊戲中我們將扮演獸人，對精靈女王芙蕾雅進行調教 您可以在遊戲中對芙蕾雅盡情宣泄獸欲，讓芙蕾雅臣服於您！游戲中內置雙結局，也有生產懷孕要素。
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文, 英文, 日文*, 繁體中文, 俄文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Fallen Elf Freya
data.detailed_description:
-Brief introduction-

The story takes place in a land called Emma. The continent is inhabited by three major races: the Human, the Orc, and the Elf. In order to dominate the resources and territories of the continent, the three races are engaged in endless wars. It seems that peace has never come to this land.

Among the three races, the Orcs and the Elves are the most conflicted and have been at war for decades. As a result of the invasion by the Elves, the Orc tribes joined together to form the Orc Alliance, which was led by Chief Drax in a massive counter-attack against the Elves. The orc tribes quickly captured the border city of Falandir, which is the most famous city of the elves and orcs. The city is most famous for its leader, Freya.

In the game, we will play as Otto, the Orc Warden. After the orc horde captured the city of Falandir, Chief Drax sent us an important mission: to ‘train the elf queen Freya’. Due to the fierce battle on the front line, Drax had to lead his troops to continue to penetrate into the elf defence line, and the captured elf queen Freya was handed over to us.

-Gameplay-

1. Time Management + Numerical Training

(Data changes affect the plot and increase the playability! No more monotonous gameplay!)

The core gameplay is Time Management + Numerical Development. We have to complete the mission of goddess Freya's training within a specific period of time. In the game, players can use the interactive mode to train Freya to obtain the increase of [Sexuality] [Depravity] [Money] and other attributes. The key to the progress of the game's plot is the data, and the progress of the plot and the final outcome of the game will be significantly affected by the changes in the data!

2. Interactive mode (tuning mode)

(Burning money! Hundreds of partial animations! Unlock new animations as the plot progresses or by purchasing props! Enhanced interactive playability, no more repetitive gameplay!)

Another core gameplay of this game - interactive mode, we will have 14 sets of interactive mode positions, each set of interactive positions with several dynamic changes! We can touch Freya's tits with our hands, lick her pussy with our tongues, and of course, we can take out our meat sticks and thrust them into Freya, making Freya your plaything! As the story progresses, more positions will be unlocked, and you can purchase items from the shop to abuse and train Freya! All of the interactive actions in Training Mode have their own animations! The total number of animations is expected to reach 200+, and there will also be intracavity perspective to satisfy perspective lovers! All of Freya's conditioning will affect the stats!





3. Hidden Plot + Multiple Endings

(Unlock hidden plots, unlock hidden new heroines, hidden NTR plots in endings!)

In the game, there is a hidden ending waiting for the player to unlock, which will be unlocked according to the player's progress of Freya's training. The player's actions will affect the direction of the ending, and reaching a specific GOODEND ending will open up a permanent training mode! Each ending and hidden plot has a beautifully built-in static CG! (The artist is a foot controller, and the CG depicts the foot in detail, a blessing for foot controllers!)





(For more exciting CG, please explore the game by yourself!)

4. Pregnancy System

A separate physiological system has been added to the game, which will monitor the heroine's physiological status during the game! Ejaculation during the ovulation period will greatly increase the chances of the heroine getting pregnant! When pregnant, the game will simulate the pregnancy cycle and change the heroine's state to enhance the player's sense of immersion! (For more exciting CGs, please explore the game yourself!)





Discover more in the game!

-Character Profile-


Queen Freyja of Flandre- (CV: Sarah Ito)

A noble and responsible leader. She is a tall woman, standing at 165cm tall, weighing 43kg, and has a magnificent G-cup bust.

As the sixth queen of the elves in Flandre, Freya has always been the leader of the elves. She specialises in the magic of transformation, and is able to use her magical powers to change form, bringing hope and miracles to her elven people.

However, despite her great leadership responsibilities, Freya has never been to war and therefore lacks the experience to fight. She has always sought peace and prosperity, not war and conquest.

As the Orc army occupied the city of Flandre, Freya, as the leader, did not run away, but chose to stand with her people to resist the Orcs until the last moment. She was captured by the Orc Co-Commander Drax and imprisoned in the Orc Bunker.
What fate awaits Freya?

Knight Commander of the City of Flandre - Seyla (CV: Nanagase Rin)

The Knight Commander of the city of Falandir. He has rich combat skills and magical talent, but has little sense of strategy. He was captured by Drax in an ambush.

Freya’s Personal Guard: Mio (CV: Yuika)

Freya’s devoted personal guard. Trained rigorously in combat since childhood, she is completely clueless when it comes to matters of love and relationships.

Wandering Beastwoman Merchant: Susan (CV: Mari Sugihara)

A traveling beastwoman merchant who roams from place to place. She seems to share a mysterious past with Otto.

Gansoor

Drax's best general, experienced in battle, defeated Knight Commander Seila and captured Freya. He is a close friend of Otto, and often carries orders for Chief Drax.

Warden - Otto

The player takes on the role of the Warden, an orc warden who is responsible for guarding the prisoners and is skilled in training female prisoners of war.

4. Pregnancy System

A separate physiological system has been added to the game, which will monitor the heroine's physiological status during the game! Ejaculation during the ovulation period will greatly increase the chances of the heroine getting pregnant! When pregnant, the game will simulate the pregnancy cycle and change the heroine's state to enhance the player's sense of immersion! (For more exciting CGs, please explore the game yourself!)





Discover more in the game!

-Character Profile-


Queen Freyja of Flandre- (CV: Sarah Ito)

A noble and responsible leader. She is a tall woman, standing at 165cm tall, weighing 43kg, and has a magnificent G-cup bust.

As the sixth queen of the elves in Flandre, Freya has always been the leader of the elves. She specialises in the magic of transformation, and is able to use her magical powers to change form, bringing hope and miracles to her elven people.

However, despite her great leadership responsibilities, Freya has never been to war and therefore lacks the experience to fight. She has always sought peace and prosperity, not war and conquest.

As the Orc army occupied the city of Flandre, Freya, as the leader, did not run away, but chose to stand with her people to resist the Orcs until the last moment. She was captured by the Orc Co-Commander Drax and imprisoned in the Orc Bunker.
What fate awaits Freya?

Knight Commander of the City of Flandre - Seyla (CV: Nanagase Rin)

The Knight Commander of the city of Falandir. He has rich combat skills and magical talent, but has little sense of strategy. He was captured by Drax in an ambush.

Freya’s Personal Guard: Mio (CV: Yuika)

Freya’s devoted personal guard. Trained rigorously in combat since childhood, she is completely clueless when it comes to matters of love and relationships.

Wandering Beastwoman Merchant: Susan (CV: Mari Sugihara)

A traveling beastwoman merchant who roams from place to place. She seems to share a mysterious past with Otto.

Gansoor

Drax's best general, experienced in battle, defeated Knight Commander Seila and captured Freya. He is a close friend of Otto, and often carries orders for Chief Drax.

Warden - Otto

The player takes on the role of the Warden, an orc warden who is responsible for guarding the prisoners and is skilled in training female prisoners of war.
data.short_description: 《Fallen Elf Freya》The game is an interactive training game where we take on the role of Orcs and train the Elf Queen Freya! In this game you can tell Freya your bestial desires and make her submit to you! The game has a built-in double ending and there is also a birth and pregnancy element.
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese, Russian, Korean
*languages with full audio support
